rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; type annexes for component-level assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings.
Ensure AGREE assumptions and guarantees refer to valid component ports in appropriate scopes.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture structure during AGREE annex insertion.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in scope.
Do not convert Boolean or event ports into numeric values unless model provides explicit data.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Component type contracts should reference ports in valid type scope.
Implementation contracts should bind to subcomponents and connections in valid scope.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
